value.reason: The cited page is explicitly about "Manage sessions" in Claude Code, covering --continue, --resume, --from-pr, /resume, session naming, branching, and transcript storage — exactly the "Resume / fork session" capability. The cell label accurately names the key CLI entry points (--continue, --resume, /resume) as documented in the command table. The description faithfully reflects the page: local transcript storage, --continue for most recent session, --resume for the interactive picker, --resume <name|id> for direct resumption, --from-pr for PR-linked sessions, and /resume for switching or branching from inside an active session. No invented claims are present.
